**Fix 2 (Line 158):** `Label variant="outline"` - The type changed from `'filled' | 'outline'` to `'add' | 'filled' | 'outline' | 'overflow'`. The value `"outline"` is still valid in the new type. No change needed.

Now let me analyze both fixes against the actual code:

Both fixes involve type expansions (new values added to existing unions), and the values currently used in the code (`"primary"` and `"outline"`) are still valid in the new types. No modifications are required.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Line 187, `Button variant="primary"` type change): **Already compatible — no change needed.** The value `"primary"` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option.

2. **Fix 2** (Line 158, `Label variant="outline"` type change): **Already compatible — no change needed.** The value `"outline"` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'add'` and `'overflow'` as new options.

2. **Fix 2** (Line 158, `Label variant="outline"` type change): **Already compatible — no change needed.** The value `"outline"` is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'add'` and `'overflow'` as new options.


Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 165
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-textarea-textarea-textareaprops-d-ts-textarea-resizeorientation-type-changed]:
Property 'TextArea.resizeOrientation' had its type changed (property): Return type of `resizeOrientation` changed from `'both' | 'horizontal' | 'vertical'` to `'both' | 'horizontal' | 'none' | 'vertical'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/TextArea/TextArea.TextAreaProps.d.ts
Before: 'both' | 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
After: 'both' | 'horizontal' | 'none' | 'vertical'

Incident context:
  componentName: TextArea
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: resizeOrientation
  propValue: vertical

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: TextArea
Prop: resizeOrientation
From: 'both' | 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
To: 'both' | 'horizontal' | 'none' | 'vertical'

Code context:
```
  164                placeholder={t('Provide additional feedback')}
  165                resizeOrientation="vertical"
  166                rows={1}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 187
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: div

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  186              )}
  187              <Button onClick={onSubmit} variant="primary">
  188                {t('Submit')}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 170
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  169              <HelperText>
  170                <HelperTextItem className="ols-plugin__feedback-footer" variant="indeterminate">
  171                  {t(

```

### Fix 4
Lines: 158, 194
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Label> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Label variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Label>
  After:  <Label variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Label><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Label>
  After:  <Label icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Label>

Incident context:
  componentName: Label
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Title

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Label
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

```
  (line 158):
  157                {t('Why did you choose this rating?')}{' '}
  158                <Label variant="outline">{t('Optional')}</Label>
  159              </Title>

  (line 194):
  193        {submitted && (
  194          <Label className="ols-plugin__feedback-submitted" color="blue">
  195            {t('Thank you for your feedback!')}

```

### Fix 5
Line: 15
Rule [sd-test-tooltip-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Tooltip is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Tooltip renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Tooltip may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Tooltip
  localName: Tooltip
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
   14    Title,
   15    Tooltip,
   16  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 165): `TextArea.resizeOrientation` type change
The value `"vertical"` is still valid in the new type union (`'both' | 'horizontal' | 'none' | 'vertical'`). The type only added `'none'`. **No change needed.**

### Fix 2 (Line 187): Button icon children-to-prop
Looking at lines 187-189:
```jsx
<Button onClick={onSubmit} variant="primary">
  {t('Submit')}
</Button>
```
The children is text only (`{t('Submit')}`), there is **no icon** in this Button. **No change needed.**

### Fix 3 (Line 170): HelperTextItem icon children-to-prop
Looking at lines 170-174:
```jsx
<HelperTextItem className="ols-plugin__feedback-footer" variant="indeterminate">
  {t("Do not include personal information...")}
</HelperTextItem>
```
The children is text only. There is **no icon** in this HelperTextItem. **No change needed.**

### Fix 4 (Lines 158, 194): Label icon children-to-prop
Line 158:
```jsx
<Label variant="outline">{t('Optional')}</Label>
```
Text only, **no icon**. No change needed.

Line 194:
```jsx
<Label className="ols-plugin__feedback-submitted" color="blue">
  {t('Thank you for your feedback!')}
</Label>
```
Text only, **no icon**. No change needed.

### Fix 5 (Line 15): Tooltip behavioral change (Popper appendTo default)
This is a **test impact** advisory about Tooltip's Popper sub-component changing its `appendTo` default from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. This affects test code that queries for Tooltip content. This is a production component file, not a test file, so the behavioral change in Popper's default doesn't require any source code change here. The Tooltip usage is standard and will work correctly with the new default. **No change needed.**

All five fixes either involve values that are already compatible with the new API, or affect components that don't contain icons (so the icon-to-prop migration doesn't apply), or are test-impact advisories for a non-test file. The file requires **no modifications**.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Line 165, `TextArea resizeOrientation` type change): **Already compatible — no change needed.** The value `"vertical"` remains valid in the new type union `'both' | 'horizontal' | 'none' | 'vertical'`. The type only added `'none'` as a new option.

2. **Fix 2** (Line 187, `Button` icon children-to-prop): **No change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 187 contains only text children (`{t('Submit')}`), no icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The icon-to-prop migration does not apply.

3. **Fix 3** (Line 170, `HelperTextItem` icon children-to-prop): **No change needed.** The `<HelperTextItem>` at line 170 contains only text children, no icon element. The icon-to-prop migration does not apply.

4. **Fix 4** (Lines 158, 194, `Label` icon children-to-prop): **No change needed.** Both `<Label>` instances contain only text children (`{t('Optional')}` and `{t('Thank you for your feedback!')}`), no icon elements. The icon-to-prop migration does not apply.

5. **Fix 5** (Line 15, Tooltip behavioral change advisory): **No change needed.** This is a test-impact advisory about Tooltip's Popper `appendTo` default change. This is a production component file, not a test file. The Tooltip usage is standard and requires no source modifications.
